title: Midnight Fennel Crunch
description: A savory and crunchy Spanish dish that satisfies your midnight craving with the perfect blend of fennel seeds.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fennel seeds
ingredients.notes: Use fresh or dried, depending on availability.

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine fennel seeds and water. Bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 10 minutes or until the fennel seeds are tender and soft.
Stir in olive oil and salt to taste. Mix well until evenly combined.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
